headline: Why KLA Corporation (KLAC) Shares Are Trading Lower Today
summary: Shares of semiconductor manufacturing equipment maker KLA Corporation (NASDAQ:KLAC) fell 5.1% in the afternoon session after a broad sell-off in the semiconductor sector was sparked by geopolitical tensions in Iran.
